calendar.description: House Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
Senate Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses leasing of water.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>makes appropriations to the Great Salt Lake Preservation Program (program) nonlapsing;<hr><ltbullet>addresses diversion or impoundment by an intervening user of leased water;<hr><ltbullet>provides for streamlined leasing of certain water;<hr><ltbullet>directs the Great Salt Lake commissioner to facilitate leasing of water for the Great Salt Lake;<hr><ltbullet>creates the program;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>creates the Great Salt Lake Preservation Board (board);<hr><ltbullet>provides for rulemaking by the board;<hr><ltbullet>establishes the leasing process;<hr><ltbullet>addresses applications related to a lease of water;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes the board to take action if a person violates a lease;<hr><ltbullet>requires reporting by the board and the state engineer;<hr><ltbullet>enacts a sunset date; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming amendments.
